_comment: Manually moderated testimonials. Schema per entry: { name, role, link, link_label, rating (1-5), quote, source ('site' | 'wp-admin' | 'wp-org' | 'g2' | 'capterra'), date (YYYY-MM-DD), published (true/false), reply (optional admin response) }. Only entries with published=true render on the site. Newest dates appear first.

testimonials.name: Priya Sharma
testimonials.quote: Our team finally has one place for customer chat per order. The internal notes vs customer notes split alone saved us from a few embarrassing leaks.

testimonials.name: James O'Connor
testimonials.quote: Replacing the WooCommerce lock dialog was the killer feature for me. Two of us can now look at the same order without one of us getting kicked out.

testimonials.name: Lena Park
testimonials.quote: The customer portal is great and the round-robin assignment is a real time-saver. Wish the dashboard had date-range filtering on top of the breakdown.
testimonials.reply: Thanks Lena — date-range filtering is on the roadmap for the next minor release. Will email you when it ships.

testimonials.name: Marco Bianchi
testimonials.quote: Drop-in REST API + 100+ hooks made integrating with our internal CRM a one-evening job. Strict types throughout the codebase, no monkey-patching needed.

testimonials.name: Sophie Tremblay
testimonials.quote: The 5-star rating + share email turned a few of our regulars into vocal promoters. We saw three new Instagram mentions in the first week.

testimonials.name: Daniel Kim
testimonials.quote: Solid plugin. The admin-bar notifications dropdown caught a couple of @mentions I would've missed in email. The Clear-all button arrived just in time.

testimonials.name: Aarti Mehta
testimonials.quote: We moved off Help Scout for our store-only customer chats and didn't miss it. The fact that customer messages live in WordPress and not someone else's SaaS is a quiet relief.

testimonials.name: Tomás Reyes
testimonials.quote: Good core functionality but the onboarding flow was a bit confusing for our part-time staff. Once they got it, no complaints.
testimonials.reply: Appreciate the honest 3 — we're rewriting the first-run onboarding for the next release based on this kind of feedback.

testimonials.name: Hannah Wright
testimonials.quote: Customer attachments work flawlessly. They send photos of damaged items, we see them inside the order, no email back-and-forth. Should be standard WooCommerce.

testimonials.name: Olivier Dubois
testimonials.quote: HPOS-native from day one, modern stack, Action Scheduler for heavy jobs. The kind of plugin I trust to put on a large client store.

testimonials.name: Yuki Tanaka
testimonials.quote: Translation-ready out of the box helped us localise to Japanese in an afternoon. Minus a star because the docs site could use Japanese versions too.

testimonials.name: Rachel Foster
testimonials.quote: Per-customer opt-outs and per-update mute means our calmer staff aren't drowning in noise. Small detail, huge quality-of-life.

testimonials.name: Karim Hassan
testimonials.quote: Read the source before installing — clean PSR-4, sensible service layer, no global state cowboy stuff. Rare for free WordPress plugins.

testimonials.name: Emily Brennan
testimonials.quote: We get maybe 30 customer questions a day per order. Having them threaded inside the order means we never lose context when someone covers a shift.

testimonials.name: Vikram Nair
testimonials.quote: Hashed guest URLs for customers, permission-checked attachments, nonce on every call — the security model is the strongest part for me. Happy to recommend.
